PGRL EVM of 99.5% reflects large residual CFO of ~300 Hz at SNR=40 dB — PGRL compensates substantially vs SGP4 (208%) but a gap to oracle (0.99%) remains; hardware-level CFO tracking or residual feedback is required for robust LR-FHSS operation.}
